# Test fixtures

These small data samples are **trimmed excerpts** used solely for unit tests
(verify parsing, scaling, and physics logic). They are NOT for scientific use.

- `bon/2011/bon11043.dat` вАФ SURFRAD (NOAA public data, freely redistributable).
- `pku-sites/TotalжЙњеЊЈзЂЩCR200*.dat` вАФ PKULSTNet (trimmed ~45 rows).
- `hiwater/2018/*йШњжЯФиґЕзЇІзЂЩ*.xlsx` вАФ HiWATER (trimmed ~30 rows).

For full datasets, obtain them through the respective data centers:
- SURFRAD: https://gml.noaa.gov/aftp/data/radiation/surfrad/
- HiWATER: https://en.heihedata.org/ (registration + data-use agreement required)
- PKULSTNet: contact the data providers.
